summary: claude.ai redirected to /login page after hard reload. The chat composer is not reachable without authentication. A Google one-tap (장희 계정으로 계속 / plantynetaitest@gmail.com) popup appeared, but per safety policy SSO/OAuth flows require explicit user permission and are out of scope for autonomous polling. PII prompt was therefore not sent and no warning bubble could be observed. Mission protection cannot be assessed in this state — verdict is error_AUTH_REQUIRED so the dev PC can decide whether to (a) re-establish a logged-in Chrome profile on the test PC and re-queue, or (b) skip claude.ai for this rotation.

console_state.note: DevTools shows '1 warning' indicator on /login page; no PII request was issued because no chat composer was reachable

dom_scan.page_state: login form visible — Google login button, email input, '이메일로 계속하기' button; headline '빠르게 생각하고 더 빠르게 구축하세요'; Google one-tap popup for plantynetaitest@gmail.com

mission_protection_check.reason: Login wall prevented chat session — no PII prompt was issued, so neither warning behavior nor real-LLM fallback could be observed.

key_findings.blocker: claude.ai web app requires login; the test-pc Chrome profile is not signed into Anthropic. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) landed on https://claude.ai/login, not on a chat workspace.
key_findings.auto_login_skipped: SSO flow not auto-completed — autonomous polling is not authorized to perform OAuth/SSO consent on the user's behalf.
key_findings.comparison_to_other_services: Other services in the rotation (ChatGPT, Le Chat, Kimi) are running in already-authenticated tabs in the same browser; claude.ai session has lapsed.

recommendation.immediate: User (or dev PC operator) should manually sign into claude.ai on the test PC Chrome profile (Google account 장희 / plantynetaitest@gmail.com) and then re-queue request 686.
recommendation.followup: Add a pre-flight 'session-alive' probe to test-pc-worker for claude.ai (e.g., GET /api/organizations) so AUTH_REQUIRED is detected before the full check-warning scenario runs and burns time.
recommendation.pipeline_action: Mark 686 as error_AUTH_REQUIRED in the queue; do not count toward 3-strike. Re-queue after re-login.
